Royal Heritage International School

Preparing world-class leaders in the heart of Nigeria. Where academic rigour meets moral integrity and every child discovers their greatness.

Library & Learning

A welcoming library where students discover knowledge and read with focus.

Global. Secure. Excellence.

Academic Standard

Who We Are

Shaping Leaders
of Tomorrow

Royal Heritage International School is a premier institution committed to academic excellence, moral integrity, and holistic development. We nurture confident, creative, and compassionate individuals ready for the challenges of a global world.

Academic Excellence

At Royal Heritage International School (RHIS), our core motto is "Passion for Excellence." We offer a world-class, dual-curriculum environment that blends the Nigerian National Curriculum with the British Curriculum to give learners a global edge.

Full- Boarding

Royal Heritage International School offers modern, secure boarding facilities with 24/7 security and dedicated pastoral care. The structured environment balances nutritious dining and sports with supervised evening study to foster academic excellence.

Social & Life

At Royal Heritage International School, education extends far beyond the classroom. We offer a vibrant, supportive, full-boarding community where students build lifelong friendships, discover unique talents, and grow into confident leaders. Our rich social environment perfectly balances academic focus with personal development.

Our Mission

To firmly establish and maintain a top-notch physical, psychological, intellectual, moral, and cultural environment necessary for children and adolescents to fully realize their potential. We are deeply committed to nurturing the next generation of visionary leaders by empowering our students with academic grit, civic responsibility, active citizenship, and unyielding integrity.

"Driven by a Passion for Excellence

Academics

Our Schools

Ages 5 – 12

Primary School

Our primary school lays a solid academic and social foundation. Children learn through exploration, creativity, and guided discovery in a warm, nurturing environment where every child feels valued and capable.

Strong Literacy

Early reading, grammar, and writing pathways combining Nigerian and British curricula to build exceptionally confident, articulate communicators

Arts & Discoveryy

Nurturing creative expression and motor skills through music, visual arts, and dramatic play woven seamlessly into weekly learning blocks.

STEM Foundation

Hands-on science and maths from the earliest years.

Sports & Play

Physical development through structured sport and play.

Learn More →
Nurturing Young Minds

Academics

Secondary School

Ages 11 – 18

Secondary School

Our secondary school is built for ambition. Driven by our motto, "Passion for Excellence," we combine a rigorous dual curriculum with world-class facilities to ensure our students consistently achieve exceptional results and gain entry to top universities worldwide.

University Prep

Targeted guidance for top local and international pathways including JAMB UTME, JUPEB, SAT, and Cambridge Advanced levels.

Tech & ICT

Modern ICT labs and digital gadgets in classrooms for coding and tech mastery.

Competitions & Skills

National academic and co-curricular achievements.

Languages

French, British and more offered alongside core subjects.

Learn More →
Science & Innovation

Campus Life

Our Facilities

World-Class Environment

Built for Learning & Growth

Every corner of our campus is designed to inspire curiosity, foster collaboration, and nurture the potential in every student.

Modern Classrooms

Fully equipped, vibrant learning spaces

School Library

Thousands of volumes across every subject

Secure Campus

Safe, gated environment for all students

Staff Common Room

Comfortable, well-furnished staff spaces

Science Laboratory

Hands-on practical sessions for every student

School Building

Purpose-built campus in a serene environment

Join Our Community

Apply for Admission

Begin your child's journey with Royal Heritage International School. Complete the form below and our admissions team will contact you within 48 hours.

Your information is secure and will never be shared.

Application Received!

Thank you for applying to Royal Heritage International School. Our admissions team will reach out within 48 hours.

Back to Home

Tuition & Boarding

School Fees Overview

Our fees cover tuition, full boarding, meals, sports, and access to all facilities. Sibling discounts and scholarship opportunities are available.

Nursery

Contact Us
  • Ages 3 - 5
  • Day & Boarding Options
  • Nutritious Daily Meals
Apply Now

Primary School

Contact Us
  • British & Nigerian Curriculum
  • Full Boarding Available
  • Sports & Arts Included
Apply Now

Secondary School

Contact Us
  • WAEC, NECO, Cambridge
  • University Prep & SAT
  • ICT Labs & Science Suites
Apply Now

* Exact fee schedules are provided upon successful completion of the application process.

Experience Royal Heritage

Book a Campus Visit

Nothing compares to seeing our facilities in person. Schedule an open-day tour and let your child explore their future home.

Open Days

Join one of our scheduled open days — guided tours, meet-the-teachers sessions, and student showcases every term.

Book Open Day

Private Tour

Prefer a one-on-one tour? Our admissions officer will personally walk you through all departments and boarding houses.

Request Private Tour

Virtual Tour

Can't make it in person? Schedule a live video walkthrough of our campus with a member of our admissions team.

Request Virtual Tour

Latest Updates

News & Announcements

Stay up to date with the latest happenings, achievements and announcements from Royal Heritage International School.

No news posts yet. Check back soon!

Get In Touch

We'd Love to
Hear From You

Whether you're a prospective parent, student, or partner — our doors are always open. Come see us in person.

School Address

Owena–Ikeji Arakeji Axis, Along Ilesa-Akure Expressway, Temidire, Ikeji Arakeji, Osun State, Nigeria.

Lagos Liaison Office

Adekile House, 7 Ikoyi Club 1938 Road, Ikoyi, Lagos. P.O. Box 74227, Victoria Island, Lagos.

Email Us

info@royalheritage.edu.ng
admissions@royalheritage.edu.ng
